title: Historical Post-039 AI Queue Bridge Opening Or Defer Decision
historical_note: This record preserves one earlier Dev Residency transition slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform on 2026-05-07. It is historical provenance, not a live mutation-seam or AI-boundary transition surface for current repo operations.

objective: Decide whether the now-published and host-proven first Olares AI workflow slice justifies opening a new `ai_tasks` bridge or wider executor-admission planning lane, or whether the current minimal MCP trio plus `apex-jobs` and packet-handoff governance should remain the operational boundary for now.
dependency_note: Packet 039 published the first-slice authority set and restored `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity at `192f0ae1ef59d4d3f66479189a1dc06d627096be`. The next truthful question is whether to open a richer queue bridge or keep the now-proven first slice as the operational model while the field-heavy window persists.
decision_requirements: Do not admit Codex or broader AI-services expansion by implication.
Do not treat publication and host parity as evidence that the current first slice is operationally insufficient.
Prefer the lower-variance operational boundary unless a concrete current blocker requires a richer queue bridge.
Name exactly one later packet candidate.
decision_rationale: The admitted first slice has now passed in all three required shapes: repo-visible authority, workstation execution, and host-side execution from `/home/olares/code/apex` after publication and clean host reconciliation.

The current documents already define `ai_tasks` as a future bridge rather than the controlling queue, and Packet 039 added no evidence that the current packet-handoff plus `apex-jobs` boundary is failing.

The current field-heavy operating window still favors lower-variance operational leverage over reopening executor admission or queue architecture complexity before the current slice has shown a real insufficiency in practice.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 041 - Packet 039 And Packet 040 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Reconciliation Gate
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06 as the post-publication decision surface after Packet 039. Packet 040 keeps the minimal admitted MCP trio plus `apex-jobs` and packet-handoff governance as the current operational model, and defers any `ai_tasks` bridge or wider executor admission until a concrete insufficiency is observed.
next_action: Publish the Packet 039 closeout and Packet 040 decision surfaces through the parent-root authority boundary, then restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to parity again before any later cadence-planning packet is opened.
